content:
# Inhibitor Efficiency

**Summary**: The effectiveness of a chemical to prevent scale formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021]] calculated inhibition efficiency for various chelating agents.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021]] Used to evaluate and compare different chemical formulations for field application.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021]] Calculated from inlet and outlet concentration of ferric ions.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 20 wt% EDTA showed the highest inhibition efficiency at all temperature conditions (84%, 86%, and 78%). ([[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021, p. 115]])
